name: Microwave Scampi
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in the microwave dish.
2. Mince the garlic and finely chop the green onion.
3. Microwave the margarine, minced garlic, and chopped green onion on High for 30 seconds.
4. Let stand for 1 minute.
5. Add the shrimp and juice from half of the lemon.
6. Microwave on High for 4 minutes, stirring and turning the shrimp a couple of times.
Serve with rice pilaf.
